commands_run: coord claim dynamic-grammar-carrier-floor "Remaining fourth wall lane: add bounded Form-native dynamic grammar carrier receipt for one rule extension and parse/lower trace; avoid BML class/source-control, model/router/data, and mesh lanes."
failure_reason: Added a pure Form-native dynamic grammar carrier floor. A rule extension is carried as data, registered by selector, parsed into an object trace, and lowered into a Form-readable trace without treating host file/config plugin loading as source of truth. The band returns 4095 four-way; richer runtime-grammar file/config loading and parser-table generation remain named next walls.
